obstacle_groups.label: Top-left block — x=0..3, y=0..3, touches top and left edges
Top-right block — x=11..14, y=0..3, touches top and right edges
Left upper stub — x=0..4, y=7..8, touches left edge; gap in center x=5..9
Right upper stub — x=10..14, y=7..8, touches right edge; gap in center x=5..9
Left lower stub — x=0..4, y=12..13, touches left edge; gap in center x=5..9
Right lower stub — x=10..14, y=12..13, touches right edge; gap in center x=5..9
Bottom-left block — x=0..3, y=16..19, touches bottom and left edges
Bottom-right block — x=11..14, y=16..19, touches bottom and right edges
